chapter_title.en: Resurrection, Reckoning, Standing Before Allah, the Exalted, and al-Ṣirāṭ

text: : قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: لا يزال قائما يوم القيامة بين يدي الله عز وجل حتى يسأله عن أربع خصال: عمرك فيما أفنيته؟ وجسدك فيما أبليته؟ ومالك من أين كسبته وأين وضعته؟ وعن حبنا أهل البيت.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 11.Al-Ḥasan ibn Maḥbūb narrated from Abū Ḥamzah, from Abū Jaʿfar (a) who said, “The Messenger of Allah (ṣ) said, ‘The servant will remain standing in front of Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, until He asks him about four aspects [of his life in the world]: “Your lifetime – what did you spend it on? Your body – what did you exhaust it for? Your wealth – where did you earn it from and where did you invest it?” And [he will be asked] about our love – the Ahl al-Bayt.’”
